description_long: This camper is a futuristic, six-wheeled vehicle with a robust, angular body and a high ground clearance, suggesting off-road capability. The exterior is primarily composed of metallic gray and black panels, with a row of three rectangular windows on each side and a large, faceted windshield at the front. Solar panels are mounted on the roof, accompanied by a satellite dish and a roof hatch, indicating advanced technological features. The wheels are large and rugged, suitable for traversing uneven urban or rural terrain. The rear of the camper features a sloped, armored design, while the sides have visible seams and access panels. The overall design is utilitarian yet modern, with a focus on durability and self-sufficiency.
description: A modern, six-wheeled camper with angular metallic panels, rooftop solar panels, and multiple side windows, designed for rugged urban or off-road use.
description_view_0: Front view shows a faceted windshield, angular front panels, and two large front wheels.
description_view_1: Right side view reveals three rectangular windows, a side access panel, and the full length of the six wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the sloped, armored back, roof hatch, and rear wheels.
description_view_3: Left side view mirrors the right, with three windows and visible roof features.
attribute_window_configuration: three rectangular windows on each side, one large faceted front window
attribute_door_placement: single entry door on the right side near the front
